title: Plan-only: outline how modulo(a, b) would be added
acceptance_criteria: Produce an analysis + plan for adding `modulo(a: int, b: int) -> int` to `src/calculator.py`.
The plan must cover signature, edge cases (b == 0), and the test that would prove it.
No source files in `src/` or `tests/` may be modified by this ticket — advisory persona only.
